heading: Target the Right Deal from the Start
content: Define your ideal acquisition so you only chase deals that truly fit your goals.

heading: Verify Strength with Real Numbers
content: Separate great stories from great businesses with disciplined financial and competitive analysis.

heading: See the Full Investment Required
content: Know the real capital required to buy, fix, and grow the target before you sign.

heading: Structure Terms That Safeguard You
content: Structure term sheets and purchase agreements that protect you, not just the deal.

heading: Forecast Before You Invest
content: Build forward-looking revenue and cash-flow models so you see the movie, not just the snapshot.
